item.title: U.S. Military veterans are occupying the Cannon building in the nation’s Capitol to protest the US’s war on Iran and Israel’s genocide on Gaza.
item.description: Protesting war and genocide lands you in jail while supporting war and funding genocide gets you a job in Congress and the White House.
item.dc:creator: jee22

24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @realMitschel cross-stitched this map of Hyrule! Great work. Check out their other posts for more!
27 Man Tax: Jhona Burjack
“I should dearly love that the world should be ever so little better for my presence.” - Arthur Conan Doyle So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: sunflowertree

item.title: The Scarlet Dumpernell
item.description:
Agreed
Dunno, sounds like propaganda
Is this called cringemaxxing now
It was an inside job
Oh man, who’s turn is it to go down and get the doordash
It’s a quest I keep meaning to do
No one touches Goldblum !
The only product of capitalism is its own ideology. Consume
Where did Rhodey put my beer!?
MOON, that spells 420 bruh
I thought she would have made a decent Kitty Pryde. Maybe Askani?
Reminds me of that Upload show
Gandalf you old stoner
Just me and my amazing friends
If everything is like a prison, why are you helping us escape Foucault?
I paid my taxes

item.title: A brewery here in WI is speaking truth to dipshits...
item.description: https://www.minocquabrewingcompany.com/ Turns out they're right down the road from me. Might have to start drinking again just to do my part. Edit: please read the article linked by u/caitie578 below before engaging with this place as there's more to this dude's story (nice to see the billboards in this area though)

item.dc:creator: Tapthisbong

item.title: The Guatemala Kittens had a blast at Dadurday!
item.description:
I took mama Bobbie and her six kittens over to my dad’s house Saturday and they were a big hit!
My dad’s wife fell in love with all of them
She had a silly grin on her face the whole time
My dad won’t admit it…
But he fell in love with Josefina
She let him know that she now loves him, too
But they spent the majority of time under the couch, nursing on mama. They still prefer cave-like places, and I had to drag them all out one by one when it was time to leave.
But overall, a successful field trip! All six in Amanda’s lap at once. They were all in heaven.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: About Face (@vetsaboutface): Disabled veterans arrested by Capitol police protesting the war on Iran. – "Not another nickel, not another dime, no more for Trump's war crimes/the cost of war is too damn high."

item.title: GovBrief Today #445
item.description: The first man walked up to Rumeysa Ozturk like he was going to ask for directions. He was the point man on an arrest team that whisked her off a Somerville, Massachusetts street for co-authoring a student op-ed. After 45 days in a Louisiana cell, an immigration judge ruled her status had been lawful all along. The Justice Department fired that judge last week. Ozturk flew home to Turkey Friday with her PhD, on her own timeline. After her release, she told reporters she had "faith in the American system of justice." The government settled only when it knew it would lose. Call your representatives through 5 Calls and Resistbot and demand Congress bar speech-based visa revocation. We've emailed 7,000+ stories over 445 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Embedded links, data, images at the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260420-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr20 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/kaskida-suit [3] https://go.govbrief.today/md-feds-sue [4] https://go.govbrief.today/paxton-act-blue [5] https://go.govbrief.today/tariff-portal [6] https://go.govbrief.today/wright-wrong-trump [7] https://go.govbrief.today/ozturk-leaves [8] https://go.govbrief.today/chavez-deremer-resigns [9] https://go.govbrief.today/mejia-sworn [10] https://go.govbrief.today/ethics-misconduct [11] https://go.govbrief.today/mills-maced [12] https://go.govbrief.today/opm-med-records [13] https://go.govbrief.today/goldplus-tsa [14] https://go.govbrief.today/patel-atlantic [15] https://go.govbrief.today/pa-medicaid-abortion Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: "The MAMDANI Act" - Fuck the GOP...
item.description: https://roy.house.gov/media/press-releases/rep-roy-introduces-mamdani-act-denaturalize-and-deport-marxists-and-islamic The MAMDANI Act enacts sweeping immigration law changes that would deport, denaturalize, deny U.S. citizenship, or entry to any alien who is a member of a socialist party, a communist party, the Chinese Communist Party, Islamic fundamentalist party, advocates for socialism, communism, Marxism, or Islamic fundamentalism. Fuck the GOP, and old guard DEMs. (The ones who stood in the way of Mamdani's election because it made them look bad, and shook up things to much for their corporate leash holders.)
item.dc:creator: Imadethisaccounttopost
